name: Rope Skipping - 3D Sports Game
description: Do you like skipping rope? Rope skipping is a very good sport. It is novice-friendly and safe. But skipping rope is also very effective for maintaining health! Rope skipping is a very casual 3D game where the player controls the character to jump on different stages. You just need to tap the screen to jump, grasp the timing and don't trip. join us!
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Boy, Boys, Fun, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids, Sport, Sports
